feat.name: Spear Dancer
feat.text: You favor weapons that allow you to lash out viciously while keeping enemies at bay, giving you an opportunity to strike without fear of reprisal. You Step and then Strike with a spear or polearm you are wielding, or Strike with the spear or polearm and then Step.

traits.name: Fighter
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the fighter class.

feat.requirement: You are wielding a weapon from the spear or polearm group
